dialogue: "You have to hold still. I'm trying to finish up here." - Medic treating Mulder

Mulder: "You can get the next mutant."

dialogue:
Scully: "Whose gun he was shot with?"
Mulder: "They shot him in the bathroom - they came in the window - "
Scully: "Who else is there with you?"
Mulder: "No one."

gameEffect: Negates the effects of any one Equipment card that adds to LONG RANGE COMBAT Skill for the duration of this combat.
dialogue: "My life up to this point has been about the need to see her again... to see them. But what would I do if they really came?" - Mulder

title: Hide

dialogue:
Scully: "This is the first time I've ever played the target."
Mulder: "Let's make sure it's not the last."

gameEffect: Play on any combatant that can use MARTIAL ARTS to add 2 to their CLOSE RANGE COMBAT skill in this round. In addition, the opponent is considered "stunned" for the next round of combat. The opponent will deal no damage in the next round of combat.

title: Webbed

Larry Moore: "A man caught in some kind of insect cocoon."

gameEffect: One Agent equipped with a "Government Car" may use this card to make one CLOSE RANGE COMBAT attack at CRC skill: 6. Any damage allocated to the Agent is taken by the car first. dialogue:
Scully: "Are you okay?"
Mulder: "I'm okay, I just got the wind knocked out of me. Don't lose him. Go!"

In addition, place the opposing Adversary in the Agents' Bureau section. The player may discard this card at any time to add two points of damage to any future combat involving an Adversary with the same Keywords.

gameEffect: Play on any Agent that has taken 5 or more damage from a single damage source. That Agent must go to the Hospital immediately and may no longer participate in the combat. The Agent cannot leave the Hospital until fully healed. Subtract 5 from the Agent's Cost. If the Cost is zero or less, the Agent is removed from the game. (Agents Lamana, Willis, Purdue and Weiss are immune to this effect.)

(Agents Lamana, Willis, Purdue, and Weiss are immune to this effect).

Basic Game Only: Apply a -2 modifier to any one skill check involving one of the following skills: CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION, SUBTERFUGE, COMPUTER.

Advanced Game: Pay the listed [CP] Cost, where X = the number of [CP] paid to gain the desired modifier to one of the following skills: CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION, SUBTERFUGE, COMPUTER. (1) = -1, (3) = -2, (5) = -3, (9) = -4.
dialogue: "The technology in this machine is of enormous scientific interest. Make no mistake, you will be held accountable." - Claude Peterson

title: The Conundrum
gameEffect: Play to negate one Keyword EVIDENCE COLLECTION card.
dialogue:
Dr. Blockhead: "In the classical sense, the Conundrum is a geek."
Mulder: "He eats live animals."
Dr. Blockhead: "He eats anything: live animals, dead animals, rocks, light bulbs, cork screws, battery cables, cranberries..."

title: Paul Mossinger
gameEffect:
Basic Game Only: Apply a -2 modifier to any one skill check involving one of the following skills: ALIEN INVESTIGATION, OBSERVATION, SUBTERFUGE.

Advanced Game: Pay the listed [CP] Cost, where X = the number of [CP] paid to gain the desired modifier to one of the following skills: ALIEN INVESTIGATION, OBSERVATION, SUBTERFUGE. (1) = -1, (3) = -2, (5) = -3, (9) = -4.
dialogue: "Everything you've seen here is equal to the protection we give it. It's you who've acted inappropriately." - Paul Mossinger

title: Intruder Counter-Measures Program
gameEffect: Play to add 2 [CP] to your pool immediately.
dialogue:
Brad Wilczek: "What is my user level?"
C.O.S: "That is now at the discretion of the operating system."

title: Dr. Aaron Monte
gameEffect: Play to change one Keyword EVIDENCE COLLECTION, MEDICAL, or CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION card to Keyword MOTIVE.
dialogue: "It is my opinion that Mr. Tooms has had a very excellent response to the months of treatment and therapy, and I would see no reason why he would be considered of any danger to himself or society." - Dr. Aaron Monte

title: Poisonous Gases
gameEffect: Force an opposing Team to make a SCIENCES 4+ skill check. If they fail, each Agent takes one point of damage. If one of the Agents has a "Gas Chromatograph", then this card has no effect.
dialogue: "What's going on in there? Mobile? Do you read me? Mobile?!" - Doctor

title: Laser Barrier
gameEffect: Play to prevent one Agent assigned to a Site from contributing the Agent's skills to one skill check (your choice) that the Team makes this turn.
dialogue:
Commander Henderson: "We're trying to contain an ecological disaster.
Mulder: "That's a lot of firepower just to protect Mother Nature."

title: Nasty Surprise
gameEffect: Play to add five tokens to your [CP] pool.
dialogue:
Mulder: "We understand you discovered Dr. Surnow?"
Dr. Keats: "What was left of him."
Scully: "How do you suppose he became trapped in the wind tunnel?"
Dr. Keats: "Someone must have shut him in."

title: Radioactive Area
gameEffect: Increase a Site Prerequisite by one point (i.e., Prerequisite: Skill 5+ becomes Skill 6+). In addition, if the Team fails the skill check, each Agent on the Team takes one point of damage. If one of the Agents has a "Geiger Counter", this card has no effect.
dialogue:
Scully: "It was a downed Libyan jet with a nuclear warhead."
Mulder: "You really believe that story?"

title: Ghost in the Machine
gameEffect: Play to change one Keyword COMPUTER, SCIENCES, or SUBTERFUGE card to Keyword RESULT.
dialogue: "DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA PHONE SEARCH SCULLY, DANA 202 - 555 - 6431" - Screen printout

title: Unnatural Aging
gameEffect: Force the Team to make a SCIENCES 4+ skill check. If they fail, choose one Agent to go to the Hospital. The chosen Agent permanently loses one HEALTH. An Agent's permanent HEALTH can never be reduced below 1.
dialogue: "The organic equivalent to rust would be rapid premature senescence." - Mulder

title: Car Troubles
gameEffect: Play on a Team of three or more Agents moving to the same Site. The Team may only send two Agents to that Site (owning player's choice). Any extra Agents remain in the Team but may not contribute their skills to any checks this turn. In addition, playing this card will prevent the use of the "Evasive Maneuver" card by this Team this turn.
dialogue:
Mulder: "What if it's possible somehow to raise the body's electrostatic charge to levels we've been seeing and to use that energy to affect objects?"
Scully: "Are you saying Lauren Kyte crashed our car?"
Mulder: "Either that, or a poltergeist."

title: Puzzles Within Puzzles
gameEffect: Play to negate one Keyword CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION card.
dialogue:
Mulder: "You can have it all. My badge. The X - Files. Tell me where he is."
Skinner: "And then what?! 'He sleeps with the fishes? We're not the Mafia, Agent Mulder. It's easy to forget, but we work for the Department of Justice."

title: Government Cover-Up
gameEffect:
Basic Game Only: Apply a -2 modifier to any one skill check involving one of the following skills: SCIENCES, EVIDENCE COLLECTION, BUREAUCRACY.

Advanced Game: Pay the listed [CP] Cost, where X = the number of [CP] paid to gain the desired modifier to one of the following skills: SCIENCES, EVIDENCE COLLECTION, BUREAUCRACY. (1) = -1, (3) = -2, (5) = -3, (9) = -4.
dialogue:
Mulder: "I'm in a box car, buried inside a quarry. There are bodies everywhere."
Scully: "Bodies?"
Mulder: "Stacked floor to ceiling."

title: Hazardous Sample
gameEffect: Play to force the Investigating player to discard all Keyword EVIDENCE COLLECTION cards in his hand.
dialogue: "I found a high ratio of Ammonia to water in the ice core. The Earth's atmosphere could never have produced those levels of Ammonia, even a quarter of a million years ago." - Murphy

title: Henry Trondheim
gameEffect: Force the Team investigating a Site to discard one Equipment card of your choice.
dialogue: "My name is Trondheim, Henry Trondheim. The ship you want is the Za'Ahr, it's a fifty ton trawler with a double hull. It's my ship." - Henry Trondheim

title: Detective Miles
gameEffect: Pay 1 [CP] to move up to 2 [RP] from your opponent's [RP] pool to your [CP] pool immediately.
dialogue: "I'm with the County Sheriff's department. You're trespassing on private property here." - Detective Miles

title: Detective Thompson
gameEffect: Play to change a Site Prerequisite to BUREAUCRACY 3+.
dialogue: "I don't work for you, sir, and unless you hear differently from the Attorney General, this case is a local matter." - Detective Thompson

title: Harry Cokely
gameEffect: Play to change one Keyword OCCULT INVESTIGATION, BEHAVIORAL, or OBSERVATION card to Keyword METHOD.
dialogue:
Cokely: "Now, are you finished with me, little sister?"
Scully: "For now."

title: Detective Tony Fiore
gameEffect: Play to cause your opponent to discard two cards at random from his hand immediately.
dialogue: "That matter is still under investigation and so I can't comment about it." - Detective Fiore, upon being questioned about the death of Charlie Morris

title: B.J. Morrow, Genetic Trait Recipient
dialogue: "Somebody's got to take the blame, sister!" - B.J. Morrow

title: Augustus Cole, A.K.A. The Preacher
dialogue: "Good night." - Last words of Augustus Cole after having been awake for twenty - four years

title: The Cigarette-Smoking Man
dialogue: "You can kill me now, but you'll never know the truth. And that's why I'll win." - The Cigarette - Smoking Man

title: Duane Barry
dialogue: "They're coming again. I can feel it. They're coming to take Duane Barry to the place." - Duane Barry

title: The Jersey Devil
dialogue:
Mulder: "You should have seen her. She was beautiful."
Scully: "Yeah, well, she just about ripped your lungs out."

title: The Host
dialogue: "It looks like I'm going to have to tell Skinner that the suspect is a giant bloodsucking worm after all." - Mulder discussing his suspect profile

title: Lucas Henry, Serial Killer
dialogue: "His personal history includes being witness to an auto accident in which his high school sweetheart was killed and his mother was decapitated." - FBI Agent

title: Arthur Grable
dialogue: "Arthur Grable is not dead. He's in a state of consciousness that no human has ever returned from." - Mulder describing Arthur Grable's head in its cryogenically preserved state

title: Warren James Dupré, The Lazarus Man
dialogue: "You killed me and let me die." - Dupré accusing Scully

title: Colonel Wharton, Zombie Master
dialogue: "To the spirit of the moon." - Colonel Wharton performing a Voodoo ritual (translated from French)

title: Alien DNA Steroid Program (Project Purity Control)
dialogue:
Scully: "But those hormones have been proven safe. They've been cleared by the FDA."
Old Farmer: "Says who? The government?"

title: The Gregors
dialogue: "We are the last remaining. Unless you protect us, we are already dead." - The Gregors turn to Scully for protection.

title: Sheriff Tom Arens, Cannibal
dialogue: "Many religions believe that the reward for eating human flesh is eternal life." - Mulder

title: The Vampire, A.K.A. The Unholy Spirit
dialogue: "I will live forever." - Vampire (Translated from Transylvanian)

title: Central Operating System, Artificial Intelligence
dialogue: "File Deleted." - Central Operating System

title: Volcanic Spore
dialogue: "A silicon - based life form in a deep biosphere has been one of the holy grails of modern science." - Mulder describing the volcanic spores

title: Michael Holvey, The Evil One
dialogue: "You must be careful. It knows you." - Elder Calusari warning Mulder

title: Eugene Victor Tooms
dialogue: "I contend that, perhaps through a genetic mutation, Eugene Tooms is capable of contorting and elongating his body in order to gain access to his victims." - Mulder, at Tooms' psychiatric review

title: Howard Graves, The Poltergeist
dialogue: "Howard showed me how Dorland had him killed." - Lauren Kyte

title: Dr. Banton and His Shadow
dialogue: "My shadow isn't mine; it's like a black hole. It splits molecules into component atoms." - Dr. Banton

title: Alien Listeners
dialogue: "We wanted to believe, we wanted to call out." - Mulder describing the Voyager mission

title: Commander Colin Henderson
dialogue: "Code indigo - delta - echo - niner, I have a confirmed fallen angel in sector eighty - seven. Mobilize Operation Falcon immediately." - Alert notice from Commander Henderson

title: Arctic Worm
dialogue: "Maybe the worm feeds on the acetylcholine which floods our capacity to control violent behavior." - Dr. Hodge

title: The Manitou
dialogue: "The Manitou is an evil spirit capable of changing a man into a beast." - Tribal Elder

title: Leonard Vance
dialogue: "You call this life?" - Leonard Vance referring to his severely burned condition

title: Ancestor Spirits
dialogue: "The spirits in this place are very angry, and the souls that died here continue to suffer; and now they have been awakened." - Gung Bituen

title: Ed Funsch, Postal Worker
dialogue:
Mulder: "Put it down!"
Funsch: "I can't. They won't let me."

title: Mrs. Paddock, A.K.A. The Dark Angel
dialogue: "Goodbye, it's been nice working with you." - Last message from Mrs. Paddock, written on a chalkboard

title: Død Kalm
dialogue: "A huge stone came out of the sky and crashed into the pack ice." - Captain Trondheim

title: John Barnett
dialogue: "I'll get you." - John Barnett, to Mulder

title: Alien Conservationist
dialogue: "Man save man." - Signed to Mulder by Sophie, the Gorilla

title: Faciphaga Emasculata
dialogue: "No one will corroborate your story. Just be glad things are under control." - Unknown Doctor, Pinck Pharmaceuticals

title: Donnie Pfaster, Death Fetishist
dialogue: "There's no way out, girly girl." - Donnie Pfaster

title: Brother Martin, Rogue Kindred
dialogue: "Touching a human man, or a woman, is as powerful for me as it was for you." - Brother Martin

title: Alien Abductors
dialogue: "You don't seem to understand, Scully. Max doesn't believe he was abducted by aliens...I believe he was." - Mulder

title: Eve
dialogue: "Psychotic behavior didn't develop in the Adams and Eves until age sixteen; homicidal behavior at twenty. Imagine my disappointment when I learned of your accelerated development." - Eve 7

title: Alien Experimenters
dialogue: "They would tell me to gather the others, so that they could do tests." - Billy Miles

title: Reverse Engineers
dialogue:
Scully: "Are you suggesting that the military is flying U.F.O.s?"
Mulder: "No, planes built using U.F.O. technology."

title: The Swarm
dialogue: "Maybe they woke up hungry." - Doug Spinney, shortly before his disappearance

title: Leonard, Detachable Congenital Twin
dialogue: "He's merely seeking another brother." - Lanny explaining his brother Leonard's behavior

title: Cecil L'ively
dialogue: "You can't fight fire with fire." - Cecil L'ively

title: Section Chief Scott Blevins
gameEffect: Treat Section Chief Blevins as a RES 2 if he is in the Bureau Section. If he is in the Bureau Section, he may contribute to the Conspiracy Pool instead of the Resources Pool during the Briefing Phase.
bio: Originally in charge of the X - Files, Section Chief Scott Blevins was directed to assign Agent Dana Scully to work with Agent Fox Mulder in order to debunk his theories. Blevins was replaced by Assistant Director Walter Skinner.

title: Albert Hosteen
gameEffect: Place a token on Hosteen's card. Discard a token to examine your opponent's hand. Select any one Conspiracy card in your opponent's hand show it to your opponent. If your opponent plays that card at any time in the game, you may immediately ask one question about the X-File. This question may only be asked the first time the card is played.
bio: Albert Hosteen is a Navajo Tribal Elder. He met and assisted Agent Fox Mulder during the events depicted in "Anasazi." He performed a ritual that helped Mulder survive injuries inflicted on him by The Cigarette - Smoking Man.

title: Lt. Brian Tillman, Aubrey Police Department
gameEffect: Place 1 [RP] on this card. This [RP] may be used to pay for any Keyword EQUIPMENT or COMBAT cards. If you use this [RP], replace it during your Briefing Phase.
bio: Agent Brian Tillman was actively working on a series of murders in Aubrey, Missouri, only to find out that the woman he was having an affair with (B.J. Morrow) was the killer. Agents Fox Mulder and Dana Scully discovered the existence of a previously unknown "killer" gene.

title: Agent Rich
gameEffect: Place 1 [RP] on this card. This [RP] may be used to pay for any Keyword EVIDENCE COLLECTION or SUBTERFUGE cards. If you use this [RP], replace it during your Briefing Phase.
bio: Agent Rich assisted Agent Lucy Kazdin in containing and successfully ending the Duane Barry hostage situation. He specializes in crisis intervention, and briefed Agent Fox Mulder in proper negotiating techniques.

title: Agent Lucy Kazdin
gameEffect: If one of your Agents is Abducted, you may immediately draw two cards.
bio: Agent Lucy Kazdin headed the team of agents that was responsible for ending the Duane Barry hostage situation. She gained respect for Agent Fox Mulder after he risked his life to free the hostages.

title: Agent Jack Willis
gameEffect: Place a token on this card. Discard a token and look through your Bureau deck to draw any one Site that asks an AFFILIATION question. Add it to your hand. Reshuffle your Bureau Deck.
bio: Agent Jack Willis was an instructor at Quantico, and had a romantic relationship with Agent Dana Scully while she was a student there. They worked together on a stakeout in order to apprehend Warren Dupré.

title: Inspector Phoebe Green
gameEffect: Place a token on this card. Discard a token to move Agent Fox Mulder from anywhere on the table to the Team Phoebe Green is in. Mulder may assist in any skill check made by the team. In this manner, Mulder may assist on two Sites in one turn.
bio: Agent Fox Mulder's love interest while he studied at Oxford, Phoebe Green went on to become an inspector for Scotland Yard. Their paths crossed again when they joined forces to apprehend the I.R.A. terrorist Cecil L'ively.

title: Agent Fox Mulder
gameEffect: [RP]s generated by Agent Mulder must be used to purchase cards. Place three tokens on this card. Discard a token to play a Site for zero [RP] cost.
bio: One of the FBI's most accomplished detectives, Agent Fox Mulder uses his background in psychology to track down and profile a variety of serial killers. His real interest is paranormal phenomena, an obsession that earned him the nickname "Spooky."

title: Agent Alex Krycek
gameEffect: Agent Krycek allows you to choose to add to the Conspiracy Pool instead of the Resource Pool during the Briefing Phase.
bio: Alex Krycek is a clean - cut Agent who professes an admiration for Agent Fox Mulder and his work on the X - Files. Krycek worked with Mulder in apprehending Augustus Cole ("Sleepless") and in searching for Agent Dana Scully after her abduction ("Ascension"). What no one else knows is that he is actually a double agent working for The Cigarette - Smoking Man.

title: Agent Nancy Spiller
gameEffect: Place 1 [RP] on this card. This [RP] may be used to pay for any Keyword COMPUTER or SCIENCES cards. If you use this [RP], replace it during your Briefing Phase.
bio: Agent Nancy Spiller, also known as the "Iron Maiden," taught Agent Dana Scully forensics at the FBI Academy. She chaired a disciplinary board convened to review Agent Fox Mulder's actions involving the termination of Eurisko Corp.'s Central Operating System.

title: Agent Dana Scully
gameEffect: Place three tokens on this card. Discard a token to examine any one Bluff card. Place Bluff card back on the Site after examining.
bio: Agent Dana Scully is a well - respected agent who, at one time, taught at Quantico. She is trained in forensics and pathology, and is highly skeptical of paranormal activity. Teamed with Agent Fox Mulder, she balances his theories with scientific reason.

title: Dr. Charles Burk
gameEffect: Place one token on this card. Discard a token to negate one OCCULT Adversary.
bio: Dr. Charles Burk assisted Agent Fox Mulder with his knowledge of digital enhancement and eastern mysticism in the case of the Calusari.

title: Agent Tom Colton
gameEffect: Place 1 [RP] on this card. This [RP] may be used to pay for any Keyword CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION or BUREAUCRACY cards. If you use this [RP], replace it during your Briefing Phase.
bio: Agent Tom Colton is a friend of Agent Dana Scully's from her days at the FBI Academy at Quantico. He asked for her help in solving a bizarre series of murders in the Baltimore area. He has an open disdain for Agent Fox Mulder.

title: Agent Janus, Trained Medic
gameEffect: Place 1 [RP] on this card. This [RP] may be used to pay for any Keyword MEDICAL or HEALING cards. If you use this [RP], replace it during your Briefing Phase. In addition, if Janus is in the Field Section, he may "heal" one point of damage on another Agent in his Team, once per turn. This may prevent an Agent from going to the Hospital.
bio: Agent Janus assisted Agent Fox Mulder in freeing the hostages in the Duane Barry incident and provided medical treatment for a critically wounded hostage.

title: Agent Moe Bocks
gameEffect: Place 1 [RP] on this card. This [RP] may be used to pay for any Keyword ALIEN INVESTIGATION or OCCULT INVESTIGATION cards. If you use this [RP], replace it during your Briefing Phase.
bio: Unlike most FBI Agents, Agent Moe Bocks believes in the possibility of paranormal activity, and has no problem applying paranormal theories to earthly events. The one case he called Agents Fox Mulder and Dana Scully in on did not involve the paranormal.

title: Agent Reggie Purdue
gameEffect: Place a token on this card. Discard this token and look through your Bureau deck to draw any one Site that asks a RESULT question. Add it to your hand. Reshuffle your Bureau Deck.
bio: One of Agent Fox Mulder's former partners, Agent Reggie Purdue worked with Mulder to apprehend the infamous bank robber, John Barnett. They teamed up again to catch Barnett after he had apparently escaped prison.

title: Assistant Director Walter Skinner
gameEffect: Treat Assistant Director Skinner as a RES 3 if he is in the Bureau Section of the table.
bio: Assistant Director Walter Skinner, at times at odds with Agents Fox Mulder and Dana Scully, still respects their investigative abilities.

title: Agent Weiss
gameEffect: Place a token on this card. Discard a token and look through your Bureau deck to draw any one Site that asks a METHOD question. Add it to your hand. Reshuffle your Bureau Deck.
bio: Agent Weiss was contacted by Agent Fox Mulder and asked to provide protection for one of the "Gregor" clones. He was the first FBI agent to encounter the Alien Bounty Hunter.

title: Agent Jerry Lamana
gameEffect: Once per game, when Agent Lamana is part of a Team investigating a Site in the Investigation Phase, he may force his opponent to show the cards in his hand. Lamana may then steal any one card. He may use it immediately in the investigation. You must still pay for the card. Whether you use it or not, place it in its owner's Discard Pile at the end of the turn.
bio: Agent Fox Mulder's first partner, Agent Jerry Lamana chose to pursue a separate path after it became clear to him that Mulder was not interested in personal career advancement. They worked together on the case involving the Eurisko Corp.'s Central Operating System.

title: Agent Karen Kosseff, Counselor
gameEffect: Place 1 [RP] on this card. This [RP] may be used to pay for any Keyword BEHAVIORAL or OBSERVATION cards. If you use this [RP], replace it during your Briefing Phase.
bio: Agent Karen Kosseff is an FBI crisis counselor who has assisted Agents Fox Mulder and Dana Scully on several cases, most notably counseling Scully in "Irresistible," and doing family intervention in "The Calusari" and "Born Again."

title: Sheriff Spencer
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION skill check.
dialogue: "Since colonial times, there's only been three murders in this area. In the last six months, seven people have killed twenty - two." - Sheriff Spencer describing Franklin, PA.

title: Dr. Blockhead
gameEffect: Negates one EVOLUTIONARY CREATURE.
dialogue:
Dr. Blockhead: "Nature abhors normality. You can't go very long without creating a mutant. Do you know why?"
Scully: "No, why?"
Dr. Blockhead: "I don't either. It's a mystery. Maybe some mysteries are never meant to be solved."

title: The Thinker
gameEffect: Change one Keyword to any other one Keyword on a card played by your opponent.
dialogue: "The Thinker is an anarchist and a snoop. Whatever he's gotten into has made him a very wanted man." - Byers

title: Byers
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's COMPUTER skill check.
dialogue: "That's why we like you, Mulder. Your ideas are weirder than ours." - Byers

title: Emil and Zoe
gameEffect: Adds 2 to one Team's OBSERVATION skill check.
dialogue:
Mulder: "What do you think they are?"
Emil: "O.K., everybody thinks that they're U.F.O.s, but I think it's some kind of star wars, cybertech, new - fangled hardware, right? Probably roll it out for Desert Storm II."

title: Dr. Davey
gameEffect: Adds 2 to one Team's SCIENCES skill check.
dialogue:
Dr. Davey: "All I can figure is, the quanta liberated off the target have virtually no mass, that they slid right through his body."
Mulder: "Like getting an x - ray?"
Dr. Davey: "A two billion megawatt x - ray."

title: Billy Miles
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's ALIEN INVESTIGATION skill check.
dialogue: "And the light came, it took me away, to the testing place." - Billy Miles

title: Dr. Diamond
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's BEHAVIORAL skill check once during your turn.
dialogue:
Dr. Diamond: "It's just highly unlikely that what you're suggesting could have survived civilization or evolution out in the woods of New Jersey."
Mulder: "Highly unlikely, but not outside the realm of extreme possibility?"

title: Detective Frank Briggs
gameEffect: Adds 2 to one Team's CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION skill check.
dialogue: "I've been waitin' twenty - five years for you." - Detective Frank Briggs

title: Detective Sharon Lazard
gameEffect: Adds 2 to one Team's EVIDENCE COLLECTION skill check.
dialogue: Eight years I been on the force, I seen a lot of strange things. But I'm telling you, this kid, something is just not right about her." - Detective Lazard, on Michelle Bishop

title: Dr. Laskos
gameEffect: Adds 2 to one Team's MEDICAL skill check.
dialogue: "It's been thirty - six hours since your rescue. I've got you on dialysis with a high flux filter. You're obviously responding well. Your electrolytes are almost back to normal and your fluid status has been corrected." - Dr. Laskos

title: The Calusari
gameEffect: Negates one OCCULT CREATURE.
dialogue: "They are the Calusari. In Romania, they are responsible for the correct observance of sacred rites." - Maggie Holvey

title: Bill Mulder
gameEffect: Adds 2 to one Agent's SUBTERFUGE skill check. Alternately, any card that would send Fox Mulder to the Hospital may be negated by playing the Bill Mulder card. If played in this way, remove Bill Mulder from the game.
dialogue:
Bill Mulder: "You're going to learn of things, Fox. You're going to hear the words, and they'll come to make sense to you."
Fox Mulder: "What words?"
Bill Mulder: "The Merchandise."

title: Sir Malcolm Marsden
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's BUREAUCRACY skill check.
dialogue: "He seems like a rather nice fellow, don't you think?" - Sir Marsden, on Cecil L'ively

title: Samantha Mulder
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's SUBTERFUGE skill check once per turn. You may have any number of Samantha Mulder cards in play.
dialogue: "The men you've been seeking are the progeny of two original visitors, clones who have been attempting to establish a colony here since the late 1940s." - Samantha Mulder

title: Max Fenig
gameEffect: Adds 2 to one Team's ALIEN INVESTIGATION skill check. Alternately, you may play this card when one of your Agents is the target of an abduction. Max Fenig is abducted instead. Discard Max Fenig. The abduction is negated.
dialogue: "Oh, let me introduce myself. I'm Max Fenig. I'm with the National Investigative Committee of Aerial Phenomenon - NICAP." - Max Fenig

title: Dr. Hodge
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's MEDICAL skill check.
dialogue: "The hypothalamus releases acetylcholine, which is what produces violent, aggressive behavior, so that might be a connection." - Dr. Hodge describes the relationship between the Arctic Worms and their victims

title: Doug Spinney
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's SCIENCES skill check.
dialogue: "I'd start thinking about how to get that generator started. Darkness is our enemy." - Doug Spinney

title: Dr. Sheila Braun
gameEffect: Adds 2 to one Team's BEHAVIORAL skill check.
dialogue: "As with many disassociative disorders, the intensity of the patient's emotions is often too much for one personality to process. So, in defense, part of the personality splits itself off." - Dr. Braun discussing Michelle Bishop's psychiatric profile

title: U.S. Marshall Tapia
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's EVIDENCE COLLECTION skill check.
dialogue:
Tapia: "Either of you two ever run an escaped convict operation?"
Mulder: "No."
Tapia: "Well then, you'd be a real big help if you just tried to stay out of the way."

title: Brad Wilczek
gameEffect: Adds 2 to one Team's COMPUTER skill check.
dialogue: "It's a puzzle, Miss Scully, and scruffy minds like puzzles. We enjoy walking down unpredictable avenues of thought, turning new corners. But, as a general rule, scruffy minds don't commit murder." - Brad Wilczek

title: Ish-Tribal Elder
gameEffect: Adds 2 to one Team's OCCULT INVESTIGATION skill check.
dialogue: "FBI. See you again in about eight years!" - Tribal Elder

title: Sheriff Mazeroski
gameEffect: Negates one GOVERNMENT PAWN
dialogue: "Answer the question. You did it, didn't you? You did something to those kids!" - Sheriff Mazeroski

title: Lt. Colonel Marcus Aurelius Belt
gameEffect: Negates one ALIEN CREATURE.
dialogue: "I think that whatever it was, he took it with him, and that was the only way he knew how to stop it." - Mulder describing Lt. Col. Belt's heroic sacrifice

title: Gung Bituen
gameEffect: Attach this Witness to a Team. Enables your Agents to deal damage to OCCULT CREATUREs as normal. For example, you may use LRC against POLTERGEISTs and VAMPIREs. If at any time there are no Agents in the Team to which this card is attached, discard this card.
dialogue: "The mushrooms we take to speak with the dead, to see our ancestors in the spirit world." - Gung Bituen

title: Gerd Thomas
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's OBSERVATION skill check.
dialogue: "Dr. Larsen was using those kids as guinea pigs, and he was using us, too." - Gerd Thomas

title: Dr. Daniel Trepkos
gameEffect: Negates one PRIMORDIAL CREATURE.
dialogue: "I say the earth holds some truths best left buried." - Dr. Daniel Trepkos

title: Maggie Holvey
gameEffect: Adds 1 to one Team's OCCULT INVESTIGATION skill check.
dialogue: "I was raised to believe, as she did, in spirits, the unseen world." - Maggie Holvey

title: Luther Lee Boggs
gameEffect: Play this card at anytime during your turn to examine your opponent's hand.
dialogue: "The dead, the living...all souls are connected." - Luther Lee Boggs

title: Senator Richard Matheson
gameEffect: Place three tokens on this card. Discard a token to add 2 to one Team's BUREAUCRACY skill check. You may discard a token once per turn. Discard this resource when all tokens have been discarded.
dialogue: "You have to get to the radio telescope at Arecibo, Puerto Rico. I'll try to delay them as long as I can, but my guess is you'll have at least twenty - four hours." - Senator Matheson

title: Successful Diagnosis
gameEffect: Place on a Team in the Hospital containing an injured Agent. The Agent heals 2 damage immediately.
dialogue:
Mulder: "How did the tests come back?"
Doctor: "Your respiratory charts were good. There were large concentrations of a chemical we determined was lucipherin."

title: Shutting Down The X-Files
gameEffect: Play on any Team containing Agent Fox Mulder and/or Agent Dana Scully. Mulder must immediately be moved to the Bureau. Scully must immediately be moved to the Hospital (undamaged). Neither may contribute their skills to skill checks this turn.
dialogue:
Mulder: "They're shutting us down Scully."
Scully: "What?"
Mulder: "They called me in tonight and they said they're gonna reassign us to other sections."

title: Reporters At The Crime Scene
gameEffect: Play when one player has just asked a Characteristic question and you were not the Directed player. If the player achieved the prerequisite skill number exactly, then he must tell all opponents the answer to the Characteristic question.
dialogue: "Government officials remain vague about the toxic cargo that has caused the immediate evacuation of Townsend, Wisconsin's twelve thousand residents." - Channel 5 News

title: I Want To Believe
gameEffect: Play on one Agent to allow that Agent to use their EVIDENCE COLLECTION skill number for any one ALIEN INVESTIGATION or OCCULT INVESTIGATION skill check.
dialogue:
Mulder: "The voice is telling me that one day she'll return."
Therapist: "Do you believe the voice?"
Mulder: "I want to believe."

title: Road Trip
gameEffect: Play on a Team in the Field during the Deployment Phase. If the Team makes a CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION 6+ skill check they may investigate two Sites this turn. Resolve each Site individually.
dialogue: "Get your car and meet me downstairs in five minutes." - Mulder

title: Hidden Transmitter
gameEffect: Play after an opponent Team successfully asks a Characteristic question. Force that opponent Team to make a SUBTERFUGE 4+ skill check. If they fail they must tell you the question and answer they obtained.
dialogue: "We go down to investigate a truck driver's encounter with a U.F.O. and the next thing we're discovering electronic surveillance equipment." - Mulder

title: Medical Treatment
gameEffect: Play on an Agent in the Hospital. The Agent heals one token of damage immediately.
dialogue: "If you keep him in there, you're going to kill him. The cold is the only thing keeping him alive." - Scully

title: The Cigarette-Smoking Man Strikes
gameEffect: Change any Keyword to any other Keyword on a card played by your opponent. This effect lasts until the end of the turn.
dialogue: "Nothing vanishes without a trace. Burn it!" - The Cigarette - Smoking Man

title: Eve 7
gameEffect: Move any Bluff cards from one Site to another Site or back into the owner's hand. If at the end of an Investigation Phase a Site is left with no Bluffs attached, discard it. X = 1 [CP] per Bluff removed.
dialogue: "Which one are you? Are you Eve 7 or Eve 8?" - Mulder confronts Eve 7.

title: Street Contacts
gameEffect: Search through your Bureau Deck and place any one Witness card in your hand. Show the Witness to your opponents. Shuffle the Bureau Deck.
dialogue: "You want to see what it takes to find the truth, Agent Mulder? You want to know the things I know?" - X

title: Government Arrests Suspects
gameEffect: Negate one Witness that modifies ALIEN INVESTIGATION or BUREAUCRACY skill.
dialogue: "This has been a terrible mistake, and I assure you that the Government will pay for all repairs and damages." - Scully

title: Red Tape
gameEffect: Play during the Briefing Phase to prevent one opponent from drawing any cards during the remainder of this turn.
dialogue: "It's kind of hard to make an appointment when you're up to your ass in raw sewage being jerked from one meaningless assignment to another." - Mulder to Skinner

title: S.W.A.T. Training
gameEffect: Play on an Agent in the Bureau. The Agent is taken out of play for one full turn. At the start of the Briefing Phase of the second turn, the Agent may be deployed as normal and in addition has a +1 in one of the following skills: LRC, CRC or the ability to use MARTIAL ARTS Combat cards. Place this card below the Agent to remind you of the increased skill.
dialogue: "Roger, Zebra team in position." - SWAT Commander

title: Fingerprints
gameEffect: Play on one Team in the Field. If the Team makes an EVIDENCE COLLECTION skill check 5+, then they may add 2 to any Site skill check. Discard this card after you've used the modifier.
dialogue: "What did we learn on the first day of the Academy, Scully? Each fingerprint is unique." - Mulder

title: Back Tracking Program
gameEffect: Play this card to negate any Keyword COMPUTER card.
dialogue: "Volume Protected, Enter Password." - Prompt on Mulder's computer

title: Evidence Destroyed
gameEffect: Negate one Keyword EVIDENCE COLLECTION card.
dialogue:
Scully: "There goes my computer."
Mulder: "Yeah. The X - rays. My Polaroids. Somebody around here doesn't like us, Scully."

title: Surfing The Net
gameEffect: Have a Team make a COMPUTER 4+ skill check. If successful, draw three cards from your chosen opponent's Bureau deck and choose one to place in your Bureau Section face down. Place the other two cards back on top of your opponent's Bureau Deck in any order. You may use the chosen card when appropriate but you must pay the cost. Return the card to its owner's Discard Pile after it has been used. Leave this card on top of the card you've taken from your opponent to remind you that the card you took is considered an EVENT, RESOURCE.
dialogue: "I found these in my Email this morning." - Mulder

title: Government Sanctioned Pheromone Experiments
gameEffect: Force an opponent Team to make a SCIENCES 4+ skill check. If the Team fails, you may choose an opposing Agent on the Team to enter combat with any other Agent on the Team. Combat will only last one round.
dialogue:
Mr. Winters: "Stealth helicopters, experimental pesticides responsible for violent behavior."
Mulder: "I saw the chopper from two different locations!"

title: Thorough Documentation
gameEffect: Play prior to a Site skill check. If the Site skill check is successful, place this card in your Bureau Section. You may discard this card in any of your investigation phases to add 2 to a Site skill check. Discard this card after you've used the modifier.
dialogue: "I don't think they'll be performing this experiment on 'Beakman's World'." - Mulder

title: Evidence Overlooked
gameEffect: If the Team makes an OBSERVATION 4+ skill check, they gain a +1 to the Site skill check. Discard this card after you've used the modifier.
dialogue: "Mulder here found a print on the T.V., a partial oblique, and it's not the victim's." - Unknown Detective to Agent Willis

title: Reading The Signs
gameEffect: Play on any Team in the Field. If the Team makes an OCCULT INVESTIGATION 4+ skill check, they may take 2 [CP] from their opponent's Conspiracy Pool and add them to their Resource Pool.
dialogue:
Mulder: "State police reported there was graffiti on the bark."
Scully: "Looks like some kind of ritual symbol."
Mulder: "Most of the refugees of Folkstone are Haitian."

title: Skinner Adopts The Company Line
gameEffect: Play whenever Assistant Director Walter Skinner is involved in a skill check. Skinner must go back to the Bureau (if he is not already there) and may not contribute his skills to any skill check this turn.
dialogue: "What I require is increased frequency of reports, conventional investigation. In short, Agent Scully, it is your responsibility to see that these cases are by the book." - Skinner

title: Safe House
gameEffect: Play on any Witness with a skill modifier to permanently add the Keywords EVENT and RESOURCE to the Witness. Thus, the Witness acts as an EVENT, RESOURCE card and remains in play. Place this card below the Witness to remind you of the effect.
dialogue: "I need your help. It may offend your religious sensibilities, but it could help save some kids' lives." - Mulder to Richard Odin

title: Crop Circles
gameEffect: Play after one of your Teams successfully investigates a Site with ALIEN INVESTIGATION skill as a prerequisite. Place this card in your Bureau. Discard this card to add 1 to an ALIEN INVESTIGATION skill check.
dialogue:
Scully: "I don't understand. How can they just disappear? They have no means of transportation."
Mulder: "No earthly means of transportation."

title: Langly
gameEffect: Force one Bluff card attached to a Site to be discarded. If there are several Bluffs at the Site, the Bluff to be discarded must be chosen randomly.
dialogue:
Langly: "Check it out, Mulder. I had breakfast with the guy that shot John F. Kennedy."
Mulder: "Is that so?"
Langly: "Old dude now, but yeah, said he was dressed as a cop on the grassy knoll."

title: Expedite Request For Resources
gameEffect: Play on a Team in the Bureau. If the Team makes a BUREAUCRACY 4+ skill check then you may search through your Bureau Deck and draw one Equipment card to add to your hand. Show the card to your opponents and then shuffle your deck.
dialogue:
Mulder: "What are you doing?"
Scully: "Going with you to the Smithsonian."
Mulder: "Don't you have a life Scully?"
Scully: "Keep it up Mulder and I'll hurt you like that beast woman."

title: Paperwork
gameEffect: Force an opponent Team to make a CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION 5+ skill check or they will be unable to add their skills to a Site skill check this turn.
dialogue:
Chief Blevins: "Agent Mulder's latest 302... requesting assignment, and travel expenses for the both of you."
Scully (reading): "'Sioux City, Iowa.' This is the first I've heard of it."

title: Unexplainable Time Loss
gameEffect: Force an opponent Team to make a SCIENCES 4+ skill check or the current player's turn ends immediately
dialogue: "People who have made U.F.O. sightings have reported unexplained time loss. Gone, just like that!" - Mulder

title: Clone
gameEffect: Play this card on any Witness that has just been played. The owning player must shuffle the Witness back into their Bureau deck immediately and does not benefit from the Witness.
dialogue: "The rest of us are dispensable. She was the first, the one from which we all came from. The one you must save." - Samantha Mulder's clone

title: Suspect Description
gameEffect: Play on a Team that fails a Site skill check when combat was involved. If the Team makes a CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION 3+ skill check, place the Site in the Bureau. At the start of your Briefing Phase, you may place the Site into your hand.
dialogue: "He's older now, he may have put on some weight. He could be wearing any kind of disguise." - Mulder, on John Barnett

title: Smoke Screen
gameEffect: Play on a Team in the Bureau. If the Team makes a BUREAUCRACY 4+ skill check then designate a Team in the Field. As long as no new members are added to that Team, GOVERNMENT Adversaries may not attack that Team. This card remains in effect until a new Agent is added to the Team.
dialogue: "Conventional investigation of these cases may decrease the rate of success." - Scully

title: Dark Forces Align
gameEffect: Play on an opponent Team in any Section. For the rest of the turn, that Team is considered to have a single Characteristic SITE Keyword (i.e., RESULT SITE). You may choose any one Characteristic for the Keyword.
dialogue: "In the name of the lords of darkness, rulers of the earth, kings of the underworld, I command the forces of darkness to bestow their infernal powers upon me. (Translated from German.) His is the hand that wounds. His is the place called Hell." - Aleister Crowley Parent - Teachers Committee

title: Computer Access Denied
gameEffect: Force an opponent Team to make a COMPUTER 4+ skill check or they will be unable to complete the skill check.
dialogue: "Come on, come on, let me in, damn it." - Brad Wilczek

title: Improved Channels
gameEffect: The Team must make a BUREAUCRACY 4+ skill check. If successful, you may now have up to ten cards in hand at the end of your turn. This condition stays in effect until you are forced to discard this card. Discard this card if one of your Agents is moved from or to the Bureau Section of the table for any reason.
dialogue: "I know you feel responsible for Agent Scully. But I will not accept resignation and defeat as self - punishment." - Skinner

title: Krycek, The Double Agent
gameEffect: Play on Agent Krycek when he is in the Field and is involved in a skill check. Krycek engages one of the Team's Agents (opponent's choice) in Combat. No other Agents may contribute skills to the combat. If Krycek sends the chosen Agent to the Hospital within two rounds of combat, then Krycek stays on the team, otherwise he is removed from play. While Krycek is affected by this card he is considered a GOVERNMENT, MASTER Adversary. Cards that would cause Krycek to be discard simply negate the combat.
dialogue: "If Mulder is such a threat, why not just eliminate him?" - Krycek

title: Spying Mission
gameEffect: Play on any Team. If the Team makes a SUBTERFUGE 4+ skill check, it may use this card to immediately negate any one card that requires them to make a non-combat skill check.
dialogue: "Quick response. I'd say you have twenty - four hours before the entire area is sanitized. After that, it will be like nothing ever happened." - Deep Throat

title: Authorized Access Only
gameEffect: Force an opponent Team to make a SUBTERFUGE 4+ skill check. If they are not successful, they automatically fail the skill check for the Site.
dialogue: "You will pack and leave town immediately, or assume the consequences of intense indiscretion." - unknown government agent

title: Equipment Malfunction
gameEffect: Force one opponent to discard one piece of equipment (your choice) that does not specifically modify LONG or CLOSE RANGE COMBAT.
dialogue: "I started these watches at the same time." - Mulder, referring to the time loss experienced at a U.F.O. site

title: The Local Law Enforcement Are Uncooperative
gameEffect: Negate one Keyword CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION card.
dialogue:
Detective Thompson: "I'll go right to the D.A.'s office if I have to. Obstructing an investigation, misconduct..."
Mulder: "That's good. Let's go see her together and, while we're at it, why don't we add withholding evidence to the list?"

title: Alien Discretion
gameEffect: Play on a Team about to investigate a Site with ALIEN INVESTIGATION as a prerequisite. Discard all cards assigned as Bluff cards at that Site. X = the number of Bluffs at the Site.
dialogue: "There's something out here, it's coming at me. Holy God!" - Lt. Col. Marcus Aurelius Belt

title: Fingernail Scrapings
gameEffect: If the Team makes an EVIDENCE COLLECTION 4+ skill check, they gain a +1 to a Site skill check. Discard this card after you've used the modifier.
dialogue: Let's have this analyzed by the Bureau's lab." - Mulder

title: Trust No One
gameEffect: The Witness's modifier is now changed to a negative (e.g., a +1 becomes a -1). If the Witness has an ability separate from the modifier, this card cancels that ability for this turn.
dialogue: "Trust no one." - Deep Throat

title: Lula Phillips
gameEffect: Play this card after an Adversary sends any Agent to the Hospital or removes an Agent from the game. Place five tokens in your [CP] pool.
dialogue: "If I were you, I'd stop talking and start passing around the collection hat, 'cause if you ever want to see Scully again it's gonna cost you a million dollars." - Lula Phillips

title: No Place Is Safe
gameEffect: For the remainder of this turn, the Bureau is considered to have a single Characteristic SITE Keyword. You may choose any one Characteristic for the Keyword (i.e., RESULT SITE).
dialogue: "His manner of entry has so far been undetectable. This may be due to his superior knowledge of the inner structure of buildings and duct works." - Scully, on Tooms's modus operandi

title: Blackmail
gameEffect: Play when you have just guessed incorrectly the identity of an X-File. Select a Team in your Bureau. If that Team successfully completes a BUREAUCRACY 4+ skill check, your opponent does not get to ask you a penalty question.
dialogue: "Don't worry, this will be our secret. We wouldn't want others to start rumors." - The Cigarette - Smoking Man

title: Dissection
gameEffect: Play this card after a Team of Agents damages an Adversary in combat by dealing enough wounds to kill it. Place five tokens in the [RP] pool.
dialogue: "Distinguishing features include large ocular cavities, oblique cranium; indicates subject is not human." - Scully

title: Application For FBI Resources Approved
gameEffect: If the Team makes a BUREAUCRACY 4+ skill check, you may borrow any one of your opponent's Agents. It may not be an Agent you already control. Add the Agent to the Team for the remainder of the turn. Afterward, the Agent returns to the original owner's control. The Agent must be returned to the Team it belonged to or sent to the Hospital if the Agent was reduced to 0 HEALTH during a combat.
dialogue: "It's your 302. Assistant Director Skinner just approved it." - Krycek

title: Expert Briefing
gameEffect: Play on an Agent in the Bureau. The Agent is taken out of play for one full turn. At the start of the Briefing Phase of the second turn the Agent may be deployed as normal and in addition has a +1 in one of the following skills: OBSERVATION, BEHAVIORAL or SUBTERFUGE. Place this card below the Agent to remind you of the increased skill.
dialogue:
Josephine Doane: "There are words I recognize but you'll need an actual Code Talker to make any sense of this. I know a man who might help. I could have him contact you."
Scully: "Thank you. Can I ask which words you recognize?"
Doane: "This word, it means goods. Merchandise. And this one, it means vaccination. They are both modern words, which is why they stand out."

title: Access Personnel Files
gameEffect: Force an opponent Team to make a COMPUTER 4+ skill check. If they fail, that opponent must tell you the next answer that they obtain regarding the X-File of your choice. The answer need not be a "yes" answer. Discard this card after you've obtained the answer.
dialogue: "Duane Barry is not what Mulder thinks he is." - Scully to Krycek

title: Hard Evidence
gameEffect: Add five tokens to your [RP] pool.
dialogue:
Scully: "Subject is 156 centimeters in length, weighing 52 pounds in extremis. Corpse is in advanced stages of decay and dessication. Distinguishing features include large ocular cavities, oblate cranium. Indicate subject is not human. Can I ask you to point that flash away from me, please?"
Mulder: "If it's not human, what is it?"

title: Relentless Pursuit
gameEffect: Play to prevent the opposing player from drawing cards after the player has paid, but before the cards are drawn. X = The number of cards that the opposing player has paid to draw.
dialogue:
Scully: "What do you think?"
Mulder: "I think I want to see what's in that cellar."

title: Deductive Reasoning
gameEffect: Play on a Team that has just completed a combat. If the Team makes a CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION 5+ skill check, then they may ask whether or not the Adversary has a Keyword that is the same as the AFFILIATION of the controller's X-File.
dialogue:
Mulder: "And then you killed Ruby, BAM!"
Tessa: "I didn't kill her. She wasn't even there that night!"
Mulder: "Well, how would you know that, Tessa, if you weren't there yourself?"

title: Grid Pattern Search
gameEffect: Select one card from your Discard Pile and place it in your hand.
dialogue: "That gives us an area of just over three square miles to cover, roughly a thousand households." - Mulder searching for Scully

title: Driving
gameEffect: Play on a Team in the Field during the Deployment Phase. If the Team makes a CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION 5+ skill check, they may investigate two Sites in the same state this turn.
dialogue: "I thought we were headed back into town. Where are we going?" - Scully

title: In-Service Training
gameEffect: Play on an Agent in the Bureau. The Agent is taken out of play for one full turn. At the start of the Briefing Phase of the second turn, the Agent may be deployed as normal, and in addition has a +1 in one of the following skills: COMPUTER, MEDICAL, or SCIENCES. Place this card below the Agent to remind you of the increased skill.
dialogue: "It is advantageous to begin an autopsy with removal of the cranium. Observations crucial to the examiner's sense of smell will not be interfered with by internal odors..." - Scully

title: Rejuvenating Caves
gameEffect: Play this card next to the X-File you have chosen. Place ten tokens on this card. Beginning on your opponent's next turn you may take up to two tokens from this card and place them in your [CP] pool. The tokens become [CP] tokens. When all counters have been removed, discard this card.
dialogue:
Scully: "So what did you see down in the cellar?"
Mulder: "Just Brother 'What's - His - Name' buried in some gopher hole in the wall - buried alive!"

title: Alien Experimentation
gameEffect: Negate any one Keyword EVENT card.
dialogue:
Mulder: "They take you aboard the ship to perform the tests."
Duane Barry: "They drill holes in my teeth. They drill holes in my damn teeth!"

title: Hidden Grave
gameEffect: Take any Witness from your opponent's Discard Pile and use it for one skill check immediately at no cost.
dialogue:
Scully: "What is it?"
Mulder: "It's a grave, shallow by the smell of it."

title: Trap
gameEffect: Play on a Team in the Field at the start of combat. Force the opponent Team to make an OBSERVATION 4+ skill check. If they fail, the following combat will be fought between the Adversary and one Agent of your choice. No other Agents may participate in the combat.
dialogue:
Mulder on the phone: "Scully, are you there?"
Scully: "No. Sorry."
Alien Bounty Hunter/Mulder: "Who was that?"
Scully: "It was a wrong number."

title: Assigned To The X-Files
gameEffect: Play to permanently add any one Agent from your hand to a Team. The normal rules for selecting an Agent still apply. In addition, the Agent may not be one that was removed from the game prior to playing this card. X = Agent's Cost.
dialogue:
Scully: "I'm Dana Scully. I've been assigned to work with you."
Mulder: "So who did you tick off to get stuck with this detail, Scully?"

title: X-Files Research
gameEffect: Play on an Agent in the Bureau. The Agent is taken out of play for one full turn. At the start of the Briefing Phase of the second turn, the Agent may be deployed as normal, and in addition has a +1 in one of the following skills: ALIEN INVESTIGATION, OCCULT INVESTIGATION, or SCIENCES. This card may not be played on Agents Mulder or Scully. Place this card below the Agent to remind you of the increased skill.
dialogue: "The reason you are here, Agent Scully, is we want you to assist Mulder on these X - Files." - Section Chief Scott Blevins

title: A Friend In The FBI
gameEffect: Play this card in the Bureau. Place ten tokens on this card. During your Briefing Phase you may take up to two tokens from this card and place them in your [RP] pool. The tokens become [RP] tokens. When all counters have been removed, discard this card.
dialogue: "I have the distinction of being one of three men to have exterminated such a creature. The innocent and blank expression as I pulled the trigger has haunted me... until I found you. That's why I come to you, Mr. Mulder, and will continue to come to you - to atone for what I've done." - Deep Throat

title: Written Report
gameEffect: Play when an Agent is forced to return to the Bureau. Prior to moving, the Team may make a CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION 5+ skill check. If successful, the Agent does not have to return to the Bureau.
dialogue:
Scully: "Those were the most paranoid people I have ever met. I don't see how you can believe anything they say."
Mulder: "Even that you're hot?"

title: Government Mindwipe Serum
gameEffect: Force one opponent to discard all cards in their hand that contain the Keyword ALIEN INVESTIGATION or BUREAUCRACY.
dialogue: "I think they wired the man's brain...some kind of selective memory drain." - Mulder, on Colonel Budahas' loss of memory

title: Travel Arrangements
gameEffect: You may move one of your Agents to any Section immediately. This card may not be played once an Adversary has forced combat until after the combat is resolved. The Agent may join any Team that occupies the new Section.
dialogue:
Scully: "So?"
Mulder: "So you and I are going to the spud state to investigate a little kidnapping."

title: Decoy
gameEffect: Play when an Adversary is allowed to enter combat with a single Agent. If the Team to which the Agent is attached makes a SUBTERFUGE 4+ skill check, the Adversary is negated.
dialogue: "It wasn't Bauvais. Those men were about to testify against Colonel Wharton, so he stopped them before they did." - Scully

title: Autopsy
gameEffect: Take a Witness from your Discard Pile and place it in your hand. In addition, if the Team makes a MEDICAL 4+ skill check, the Witness's modifier is doubled if played this turn.
dialogue: "Several anomalies were discovered during postmortem analysis that were undetected in previous autopsies." - Scully

title: Evasive Maneuvers
gameEffect: Negate one non-PHENOMENA Adversary.
dialogue: "Suspect now westbound. Has entered the shade of the shipworks off of April Street. Unit fifty still in pursuit!" - Georgetown Police

title: Frohike
gameEffect: This card will negate one Event card played on your Team.
dialogue:
Mulder's phone rings.
"If that's the lovely Agent Scully, let her know I've been working out. I'm buff!" - Frohike

title: Road Hazard
gameEffect: Negate one card with the Keyword MOVE.
dialogue: "And the U.S. Department of Transportation estimates over 190,000 fatal car crashes each year are caused by sleepiness." - Krycek

title: Core Training
gameEffect: Play on an Agent in the Bureau. The Agent is taken out of play for one full turn. At the start of the Briefing Phase of the second turn, the Agent may be deployed as normal, and in addition has a +1 in one of the following skills: CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION or EVIDENCE COLLECTION. Place this card below the Agent to remind you of the increased skill.
dialogue: "Right here, at the corner of Old Forge Road and Madison. And I'm betting Scully is somewhere within this five - mile area." - Mulder

title: Samuel Hartley
gameEffect: Play on a Team in the Field that has just had an Agent removed from the game this turn. Make an OCCULT INVESTIGATION skill check of 4+. If successful, the Agent remains in play.
dialogue: "For this is the power of belief, the power to separate the light from the darkness, to create life from death." - Samuel

title: True Grit
gameEffect: Play when an Agent is forced to go to the Hospital. He must still go to the Hospital by the end of this turn but he may add his skills to one skill check before going.
dialogue:
Crew - Cut Man: "Your cellular phone has been ringing off the hook."
Mulder: "I'm a popular guy. Why don't you answer it for me?"
Crew - Cut Man: "I don't like talking on the phone. I have this thing about unsecured lines."

title: Decreased Workload
gameEffect: Play during the Briefing Phase. One Team in the Bureau may make a BUREAUCRACY 4+ skill check. If successful, choose one Agent. The Agent now has a RES number equal to the Agent's CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION skill during the next Briefing Phase. Place this card below the Agent to remind you of the increased skill.
dialogue: "Agent Scully and I might have been able to save that man's life, but you shut us down." - Mulder to Skinner

title: Laptop Computer
gameEffect: Adds 2 to the Agent's COMPUTER skill.
dialogue: "...X - ray analysis confirms homologous but possibly mutated mammalian physiology... however, does not account for small, unidentified object found in subject's nasal cavity... a gray metallic implant, four millimeters in length..." - Scully's recorded voice

title: Gas Chromatograph
gameEffect: Agents equipped with a Gas Chromatograph have access to the field office crime lab. Adds 1 to the Agent's SCIENCES skill.
dialogue:
Mulder: "Whatever I'm smelling, is it toxic?"
Jason Ludwig: "Between the heat and the sulfur it can get pretty nasty in here. But it won't hurt you."

title: Wire-Tap
gameEffect: Adds 1 to the Agent's SUBTERFUGE skill.
dialogue: "I had enough on that surveillance to arrest those suspects after three days, I could have nailed them on forty counts of bank fraud. But you left me there. I'm surprised you even noticed I was gone." - Mulder

title: Binoculars
gameEffect: Adds 1 to the Agent's OBSERVATION skill.
dialogue:
Scully: "You know, Mulder, from back there you look like him."
Mulder: "Him?"
Scully: "Deep Throat."
Mulder: "He's dead, Scully. I attended his funeral at Arlington through eight - power binoculars from a thousand yards away."

title: Medi-Kit
gameEffect: An agent with MEDICAL skill may use the Medi-Kit to heal one wound on any agent in the Team once per turn. The may prevent an Agent from going to the Hospital.
dialogue: "This man is gonna die if we don't get him to a hospital." - Agent Janus

title: Kevlar Vest
gameEffect: The Kevlar Vest will absorb three points of damage. Place three tokens on this card. Discard a token to prevent one point of damage. Discard the Vest when all the tokens have been discarded. Excess damage is applied to the Agent as normal.
dialogue: "The bullet went through eight layers of Kevlar. You're lucky to be alive." - Mulder to Scully

title: Glock 19 Semi-Automatic Pistol
gameEffect: Adds 2 to the Agent's LONG RANGE COMBAT skill.
dialogue: "I pull the trigger two seconds earlier and Wallenberg would be here to see his kid play. Instead... I've got a dead man robbing jewelry stores and sending me haikus." - Mulder

title: High Resolution Camera
gameEffect: Adds 1 to the Agent's OCCULT INVESTIGATION skill.
dialogue: "So you're saying a ghost killed Teddy Holvey. Has anyone checked the camera that took this photo? The lens and the pressure plate?" - Scully

title: High-Powered Flashlight
gameEffect: Adds 2 to the Agent's OBSERVATION skill.
dialogue: "The power's been turned off, although the control panel lights are still on." - Mulder investigating the Arecibo array

title: Government Car
gameEffect: Adds 1 to the Agent's CRIMINAL INVESTIGATION skill.
dialogue: "Requisition for a car, please. Thank you." - Mulder

title: Knife
gameEffect: Adds 1 to the Agent's CLOSE RANGE COMBAT skill.
dialogue: "Don't hurt him. Just tell us what you want. Why don't you give me the knife?" - Scully

title: Taped Intelligence
gameEffect: Adds 2 to the Agent's BUREAUCRACY skill. GOVERNMENT Adversaries may now attack the Agent's Team when investigating a Site, even when they would otherwise be barred from doing so.
dialogue:
Scully: "What is this?"
Mulder: "The holy grail. The original Defense Department files. Hard evidence the government has known of the existence of extraterrestrial life for almost fifty years."

title: Walther PPK 7.65 Hold Out Weapon
gameEffect: Adds 2 to the Agent's CLOSE RANGE COMBAT skill.
dialogue: Freeze! Drop the gun, FBI. Drop the gun now!" - Jack Willis

title: Geiger Counter
gameEffect: Adds 1 to the Agent's ALIEN INVESTIGATION skill.
dialogue: "The radiation level is five times the norm." - Mulder, on the radiation levels at a U.F.O. site

title: Hospital Crash Cart
gameEffect: This piece of Equipment does not need to be attached to any Agent. Place three tokens on the Hospital Crash Cart. Discard one token to heal one point of damage to an Agent in the Hospital. Discard when all three tokens have been expended.
dialogue: "Code Blue, Crash Cart!" - Nurse, Georgetown Hospital

title: Cellular Phone
gameEffect: The Agent may add his skills to a skill check that is occurring in another Section of the table. The Agent's skill is reduced by one (i.e.; Skill: 3 becomes Skill: 2). LONG RANGE COMBAT and CLOSE RANGE COMBAT may not be added.
dialogue: "The single connecting trace evidence in the killing is the destruction of an electrical device at the crime scene. A pager, a fax, a cellular phone, a gas pump digital display." - Mulder, on the murders in Franklin, PA

title: Symbol Of Faith
gameEffect: OCCULT Adversaries may not assign damage to this Agent unless there are no other eligible targets. If the Agent is the only eligible target then the damage from OCCULT Adversaries is halved.
dialogue:
Mulder: "If she was such a skeptic, why did she wear that?"
Margaret Scully: "I gave it to her on her 15th birthday."

title: Electron Emission Microscope
gameEffect: Agents equipped with an Electron Emission Microscope have access to the field office crime lab. Adds 1 to the Agent's MEDICAL skill.
dialogue:
Henderson: "Okay, first impressions: The ink is fresh. The note was written in the last forty - eight hours. Ball - point, but you knew that. A right - hander. Let's see... written by someone sitting down. But now I'm just showing off."
Mulder: "Does it match Barnett?"
Henderson: "I'd say it's him."

title: Shotgun
gameEffect: Adds 3 to the Agent's LONG RANGE COMBAT skill once per combat. Damage may be split if there are multiple opponents (your choice).
dialogue:
Lyle Parker: "We want to settle peacefully in court."
Scully: "Well, Joseph Goodensnake is dead with a wound from your shotgun to indicate otherwise."

title: M-16 Assault Rifle
gameEffect: Adds 2 to the Agent's LONG RANGE COMBAT skill. Damage may be split if there are multiple opponents (your choice).
dialogue: "There's a general briefing at 2200 hours, but first go to headquarters for live rounds." - Commander Colin Henderson

title: Mojo Bag
gameEffect: Subtract one point from each damaging hit caused by an OCCULT CREATURE. In addition, OCCULT Adversaries may not play combat cards on Agents equipped with a Mojo Bag.
dialogue: "For such a pretty lady, it's dangerous out here. You need something pour vous gardez. For protection." - Chester Bonaparte

title: Lie Detector
gameEffect: Adds 1 to the Agent's BEHAVIORAL skill.
dialogue:
Examiner: "Are you over one hundred years old?"
Agent Colton: "That must be a control question."
Mulder: "I had her ask it."
Tooms: (pause) "No."

title: Slithers In The Night
dialogue:
Mulder: "Scully... snake skin!"
Scully: "There's a python in Paddock's room!"

title: Hunter In The Dark
gameEffect: The LONG RANGE COMBAT round is skipped.
dialogue: "What if, by some fluke of nature, a human was born who reverted to its most animal instincts... a kind of carnivorous Neanderthal? Wouldn't he occupy a space above us on the food chain?" - Mulder

title: Crew-Cut Man
gameEffect: The chosen Agent is the only one who may participate in the Combat. The Crew-Cut Man may use MARTIAL ARTS and SUBTERFUGE cards.
dialogue: "Your work here is done." - Crew - Cut Man

title: Alien Bounty Hunter
gameEffect: Each source of damage affecting the Alien Bounty Hunter in CLOSE RANGE COMBAT also causes 1 damage to each opposing Team member involved in the Combat (because he has poisonous blood). The Hunter may use MARTIAL ARTS and SUBTERFUGE Combat cards. If killed in Combat, place the Hunter back in your deck and shuffle.
dialogue: "Your plans will not succeed." - Alien Bounty Hunter to one of the Gregors

title: The Host Attacks
gameEffect: Place five tokens on any Agent that loses HEALTH as a result of this creature's attack. Remove a token in each of that Agent's Briefing Phases. At the end of the turn in which the last token is removed, the Agent is removed from the game. This card can be negated by the Team containing the afflicted Agent making a MEDICAL 3+ skill check or by playing a HEALING card on the afflicted player prior to the Agent being removed.
dialogue: "They are free - living carnivorous scavengers. Many species require more than one host to complete a life cycle." - Scully describes the Flukeworm.

title: Pvt. McAlpin, Zombie
gameEffect: LONG RANGE COMBAT attacks cause only half damage (round up) to the Zombie.
dialogue:
Scully: "He's non - verbal; non - responsive to voice, touch or pain. The neurologist suspects he's suffered a severe concussion in the crash, resulting in amnesia."
Mulder: "That's a plausible diagnosis, only I'm more interested in how he came back to life."

title: Good People, Good Food
gameEffect: Damage caused by this creature may be split among all opponents (Directed Player's choice).
dialogue: "Scully, I think that the good people of Dudley have been eating more than just chicken." - Mulder

title: The Sandman
gameEffect: The Creature has LONG RANGE COMBAT and CLOSE RANGE COMBAT equal to the highest Combat rating on the opposing team (including modifiers) +1. The Sandman may use SUBTERFUGE Combat cards.
dialogue: "The truth is what you did to us, what you made us do!" - Augustus Cole

title: Abduction
gameEffect: Pick one Agent in the Team. That Agent is placed ten cards down, face up, in the owning player's Bureau deck. Any equipment that Agent had is discarded. When the Agent's card reaches the top of the deck, the Agent is immediately moved to the Hospital (undamaged). This card does not initiate Combat.
dialogue: "The government knows about it you know. They're even in on it sometimes. Right there in the room when they come. They work together with a secret corporation." - Duane Barry

title: Squeeze
gameEffect: The LONG RANGE COMBAT round is skipped.
dialogue: "The preliminary medical exam revealed quite abnormal development in the muscular and skeletal systems." - Scully reviews Tooms' abnormal physiology.

title: The Psychotic Attack
gameEffect: Damage from LONG RANGE COMBAT may be split among all opponents (Directed Player's choice).
dialogue: "Time to call '911'." - Cecil L'ively

title: The Mechanic
gameEffect: The Mechanic may use MARTIAL ARTS and SUBTERFUGE Combat cards.
dialogue:
Mulder: "There were three men last night. I was chased!"
Deep Throat: "If you were chased you would have been killed. Those men are trained for that sort of business, and they are trained very well."

title: Darkness Falls
gameEffect: Unless a HEALING card is played immediately and the card results in one point being healed, move the Agent to the Hospital. The Agent must stay in the Hospital for the next turn.
dialogue:
Scully: "Mulder, get them off me!"
Mulder: "They're not just on you, they're everywhere."

title: Suppressed Fury
gameEffect: Regardless of how much damage is done to this creature in the LONG RANGE COMBAT round, it will attack in the CLOSE RANGE COMBAT round. If its HEALTH has been exceeded, it is removed at the end of the CRC round.
dialogue: "His father used to beat him with coat hangers." - Agent Thomas

title: Living Machine
gameEffect: Fight Combat as normal except skip LONG RANGE COMBAT and go straight to CLOSE RANGE COMBAT. Agents must use their COMPUTER skill as their value in CRC. If an Agent has no COMPUTER skill, his value is 1.
dialogue: "The machine's a monster, Scully - it's already killed two people." - Mulder

title: Operation Falcon Blue Berets
gameEffect: Damage caused by this creature may be split among all opponents (Directed Player's choice). The Blue Berets may use MARTIAL ARTS Combat cards.
dialogue: "Beta team, target entering your section from the southwest. Search and destroy, repeat, search and destroy." - Commander Henderson

title: Pheromone-Induced Psychosis
gameEffect: Play this card on a Team in the Field that plays a Witness. The Witness card is discarded and the Team is attacked! The Creature's LONG RANGE COMBAT and CLOSE RANGE COMBAT are equal to the Witness's modifier. If the Witness has no modifier, treat the Witness as a +3.
dialogue: "There is no way to know who will be a killer or who will be killed." - Mulder, in a letter to Scully

title: Deadly Blur
gameEffect: Any Agent damaged by the Deadly Blur is placed in the Hospital for the next two turns regardless of how much HEALTH they have. Each opponent's LONG RANGE COMBAT and CLOSE RANGE COMBAT is reduced by one point. The Deadly Blur may use SUBTERFUGE Combat cards.
dialogue:
Mulder: "No human pilot walked away from the wreckage I saw."
Scully: "Well, maybe he ejected."

title: The Manitou Stalks His Prey
gameEffect: Any Agent wounded by the Manitou may not heal wounds until a Healing card is successfully played on him.
dialogue: "It was no kind of animal that I know of, but it damn well didn't seem human, neither." - Mr. Parker

title: Poltergeist Attack
gameEffect: The Poltergeist is unaffected by Combat attacks. It will attack for only one LONG RANGE COMBAT and one CLOSE RANGE COMBAT round and then is discarded.
dialogue: "Lauren, how will you be able to rest if he never can?" - Scully questioning Lauren Kyte concerning the poltergeist Howard Graves

title: Kiss Of The Vampire
gameEffect: Play this card on a Team in the Field that plays a Witness. Discard the Witness card. The Witness actually becomes a lesser vampire that attacks the Team in conjunction with the master vampire, with a CLOSE RANGE COMBAT rating of 3 and a HEALTH rating of 3. LONG RANGE COMBAT will cause no damage to either vampire.
dialogue: "He who eats of my flesh and drinks of my blood shall have eternal life and I will raise him up on the last day." - John 52:54

title: John Barnett Links You To Mulder
gameEffect: This Adversary regenerates (Heals) two points of HEALTH at the beginning of each combat round as long as his HEALTH is not at zero.
dialogue: "A hunted Fox eventually dies." - John Barnett's note

title: Brother Martin Is Attracted To You
gameEffect: This card does not initiate combat. Place three damage tokens on any Agent in the Investigating Team. The damaged Agent must be moved to the Hospital immediately and heals at half the normal rate. The Agent may not leave the Hospital until all damage is healed, and cannot be removed using other cards (Crash Cart, First Aid, etc.).
dialogue: "It was always forbidden. But after the first time, I couldn't help myself." - Brother Martin

title: Leonard
gameEffect: This card does not initiate combat. Flip the top card of the Investigating player's Bureau Deck. If it is a Witness card, then both Leonard and the Witness card are removed from the game. If not, then keep flipping until a Witness or 10 cards have been flipped. Flipped cards are placed on the owning player's discard pile.
dialogue: "If you're trying to tell me his twin brother can crawl out of his body and then go gallivantin' around town, you're as drunk as he is!" - Sheriff

title: F. Emasculata Outbreak
gameEffect: This card does not initiate combat. Play this card in the Investigating Player's Hospital section. Place three tokens on this card. Remove one token in the Debriefing Phase of your opponent's turn. This card is discarded when the last token is removed. Agents may not heal as long as this card is in their Hospital section.
dialogue: "You knew about it and you didn't say anything. Why should I tell the truth if you won't?" - Elizabeth

title: The Evil One
gameEffect: This card does not initiate combat. Play this card in conjunction with any other Adversary that initiates combat. The Adversary's LRC, CRC, and HEALTH are doubled.
dialogue: "Voi ielelor, maiestrelor - dusmanele camenilor - stapinele vintului - doamnele..." - Maggie Holvey

title: Spirit Of The Amaru
gameEffect: Count the number of Adversary cards in the opposing Teams' discard pile. The Amarus Spirits' CLOSE RANGE COMBAT, LONG RANGE COMBAT, and HEALTH are equal to the number of Adversary cards in the discard pile.
dialogue: "I think whatever happened to Craig Horning will continue to happen.... until the bones are returned to their rightful place." - Dr. Lonnie Bilac

title: Limited Choices
gameEffect: Play this card to cause the Investigating player to discard X number of cards (chosen randomly) from his hand. X = [CP] cost paid.
dialogue:
Mulder: "Did he make you make a choice?"
Mrs. Mulder: "No. I couldn't choose. It was your father's choice, and I hated him for it. I still hate him for it."

title: Too Close To The Truth
gameEffect: Play this card to allow you to exchange [CP] Pools with your opponent.
dialogue:
Scully: "We saw bodies back there - men who had been exposed to high levels of radiation."
The Cigarette - Smoking Man: "You saw nothing."
Mulder: "You won't get away with this. You can't bury the truth!"

title: Injured Relative
gameEffect: Force one opposing Agent (your choice) to go to the Hospital immediately (undamaged).
dialogue:
Margaret Scully: "My daughter was brought here. I'm trying to find her."
ER Doctor: "Okay. All right. What's her name?"
Mrs. Scully: "Scully, Dana Scully."
ER Doctor: "Melissa Scully?"
Mrs. Scully: "No, that's her sister."

title: Explosion
gameEffect: Play this card to cause one point of damage to every Agent in a Team for each [CP] Cost card discarded from your hand, up to a maximum of three points of damage. X = number of [CP] Cost cards discarded.
dialogue:
Krycek: "I'm alive. Isn't that a surprise?"
The Cigarette - Smoking Man: "Yes, good, good, good... ahh... where are you?"
Krycek: "Somewhere that you'll never find me, you double - crossing son of a bitch."
The Cigarette - Smoking Man: "Are you sure?"

title: Lock Pick
gameEffect: Adds 2 to the Agent's SUBTERFUGE rating.
dialogue: "How did you get in?" - Mulder

title: U.S.G.S. Quadrant Map
gameEffect: Attach this card to any Agent in the Bureau. Discard this card to search your Bureau Deck and add any one Site card to your hand. Show your opponent which card you have added. Shuffle your deck.
dialogue: "You want to see something weird, Mulder? Ellen's Air Force Base isn't even on my U.S.G.S. Quadrant map." - Scully

title: Nurse Owens
gameEffect: During the Briefing Phase, place one token on every Agent you control that normally starts with at least one token. This token is usable in the same way that starting tokens can be used.
dialogue: "Dana, honey, I know you can hear me. This is Nurse Owens, I'm here to take care of you sweetheart, watch over you." - Nurse Owens

title: One Breath
gameEffect: Play this card to search through your Bureau Deck and add any one Event card to your hand. Show your opponent which card you have added. Shuffle your deck.
dialogue: "To me, life went at the proper pace. There were many rewards. Until the moment it ended and I understood that I would never see you again, my little girl. Then my life felt as if it had been the length of one breath." - William Scully

title: Taking Chances
gameEffect: Play this card to search through your Bureau Deck and add any one Adversary card to your hand. Show your opponent which card you have added. Shuffle your deck.
dialogue:
Dyer: "I say we make a run for it. Split up, take our chances."
Perkins: "That's suicide Dyer!"
Dyer: "Fine, you stay here. Tell us how it turns out!"

title: A Friend In The Lab
gameEffect: Play this card to search through your Bureau Deck and add any one Equipment card to your hand. Show your opponent which card you have added. Discard this card and shuffle your deck.
dialogue: "You've got quite a case here Mulder, I almost wish I could be in your shoes." - Arson Specialist

title: A False Leads
gameEffect: Play this card whenever the Investigating player has played a card that allows him to search through his deck and add a card to his hand. As soon as he shows you the card, play this card. The card he added is removed from the game, along with this card.
dialogue:
Mulder: "Why did you lie to me?"
Deep Throat: "There are still some secrets which should remain secret, truths that people are just not ready to know."

title: Witness Intimidated
gameEffect: Play on any Witness during your opponent's Investigation Phase. Pay X [CP] where X = the [RP] cost of the Witness. The Witness card is negated.
dialogue: "They said if I spoke to anyone, they would withhold my husband's pension, and I have a child to take care of." - Mrs. Wright

title: Assassinated
