gameEffect: Play on any Witness during your opponent's Investigation Phase. The Witness card is negated and removed from the game along with this card. To gain a permanent skill increase of +1 on an investigating team agent, place this card beneath the agent.
dialogue: "Trust no one." - Deep Throat

title: Security Clearance
gameEffect: Negate any one Keyword SUBTERFUGE card.
dialogue:
Guard: "Name?"
Scully: "Dana Scully."
Guard: "Company or institution?"
Scully: "Federal government."
Guard: "Project password? Project password?"
Scully: "Purity Control."

title: Dr. Joe Ridley
gameEffect: Negate any one Keyword MEDICAL card.
dialogue: "The man who owns the fountain of youth controls the world." - Dr. Joe Ridley

title: Colonel Kissell
gameEffect: Negate any one Keyword SCIENCES card.
dialogue:
Mulder: "Why don't you talk to us about Colonel Budahas?"
Kissell: "Why don't you get the hell out of my yard?"

title: Meet Brother Andrew
gameEffect: Negate any one Keyword BEHAVIORAL card.
dialogue:
Scully: "He told me he knew who the killer was."
Mulder: "How did you know he wasn't the killer?"
Scully: "I don't know. I believed him."

title: Misclassified Case
gameEffect: Play this card during the case assignment phase to prevent your opponent from playing any adversaries at this Site.
dialogue:
Mulder: "You know, you had a pair of Agents that could have handled a case like this. Agent Scully and I might have been able to save that man's life, but you shut us down."
Skinner: "I know. This should have been an X - File. We all take our orders from someone, Agent Mulder."

title: Additional Resources
gameEffect: Search through your Bureau Deck and select an Agent with a Cost of 4 or less. Add this Agent to your team of Agents in the Bureau section. If this card is negated, remove it as well as the selected Agent from the game. During the Briefing Phase, pay X+1 [RP] upkeep or discard this card and the selected Agent.
dialogue:
Agent Brisentine: "You're being relieved from your current assignment. Agent Bozoff will take over. You've got a flight to catch in 45 minutes."
Mulder: "Where am I going?"
Brisentine: "Murder case; Newark, New Jersey."

title: Women's Health Clinic, Richville, MD
question: You may ask one MOTIVE question.
dialogue: "If anything should happen to me, or if we become separated, you must meet me here: 1255 91st St., Richville, MD." - Note to Fox Mulder from Samantha Mulder

title: Tracking The Killer
question: You may ask one MOTIVE question.
dialogue: "The deaths follow a pattern. New Jersey, New York, Scranton, and then an ad is placed here in Binghamton looking for a man exactly like the others. The killer is moving in a northerly direction." - Mulder

title: Mrs. Mulder
gameEffect: Adds zero to one Team's ALIEN INVESTIGATION or BEHAVIORAL skill check. If this card is used in a successful Site investigation, the owning player may ask "Is your X-File's Affiliation Government?" in addition to the Site question for zero cost.
dialogue:
Mrs. Mulder: "It was all so long ago."
Fox Mulder: "I need you to try to remember mom."
Mrs. Mulder: "I don't remember their names anymore. What does this have to do with, Fox?"
Fox Mulder: "I think it has to do with Samantha."

title: Margaret Scully
gameEffect: Adds one to one Team's MEDICAL or SCIENCES skill check. This card may be played for zero [RP] and treated as a +4 to the appropriate skill if Agent Dana Scully is in the Hospital or if the Witness card Melissa Scully has been removed from the game.
dialogue:
Margaret Scully: "There must be some mistake."
Albert Hosteen: "Is your daughter the F.B.I. woman?"
Mrs. Scully: "Dana? You know where she is. Is she okay?"
Hosteen: "Yes, I believe so."

title: Melissa Scully
gameEffect: Adds two to one Team's OCCULT INVESTIGATION or SUBTERFUGE skill check. Alternately, play this card when Agent Dana Scully is damaged in combat. Dana Scully takes no damage and Melissa Scully is damaged instead. Remove this card from the game.
dialogue: "You are so shut off to the possibility there could be any other explanation except for your rigid scientific view of the world. It's like you've lost all touch with your own intuition." - Melissa Scully
